zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Brooke於大約1470年出生在英國爾麗頓 煙雨 明書爾時，她的父親Thomas Brooke24歲，母親Anne Venables18歲。她於1487年與Roger Mainwaring在英國英格蘭爾結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1499年在英國爾南特維其享年30歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Brooke于大约1470年出生在英国爾麗頓 煙雨 明書爾时，她的父亲Thomas Brooke24岁，母亲Anne Venables18岁。她于1487年与Roger Mainwaring在英国英格兰爾结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。她去世于1499年在英国爾南特維其享年30岁。

nameMeanings.name: Brooke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Brook  , which preserves a trace of the Old English dative singular case, originally used after a preposition (e.g. ‘at the brook’).

History: In 1650, Robert and Mary Mainwaring Brooke brought ten children and a number of servants with them from England to MD, where Robert became governor. Although the fourteen known contemporary Brooke immigrants in VA included Robert's brothers Richard and Humphrey, the relationships of the others are unknown. Brooke family memorials remain in the Anglican church at Whitchurch, Hampshire, England.

variants.name: Brook
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived by a brook, stream, water-meadows or low, marshy ground, from Middle English brook, Old English brōc ‘brook, stream’; or a habitational name from any of various places called with this word, such as Brook (Kent, Rutland) or Brooke (Norfolk).
North German: topographic name for someone who lived by a water meadow or marsh, from Low German brook (cognate with German Bruch ‘swamp’ and Old English brōc; see 1 above).
Americanized form of Dutch Broek: topographic name from broek, a cognate of 2 above.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Brooke was born about 1470, in Leighton with Minshull, Cheshire, England, her father, Thomas Brooke, was 24 and her mother, Anne Venables, was 18. She married Roger Mainwaring in 1487, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died in 1499, in Nantwich, Cheshire, England, at the age of 30.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Brooke est née environ 1470, à Leighton with Minshull, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Brooke, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Anne Venables, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Roger Mainwaring en 1487, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1499, à Nantwich, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 30 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Brooke um 1470 in Leighton with Minshull, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Brooke 24 und ihre Mutter Anne Venables 18. Sie hat 1487 in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Roger Mainwaring geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1499 im Alter von 30 Jahren in Nantwich, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Brooke è nata il circa 1470 nel Leighton with Minshull, Cheshire, England, sua padre, Thomas Brooke, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Anne Venables, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Roger Mainwaring nel 1487, nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì nel 1499, nel Nantwich, Cheshire, England, all'età di 30 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Brookeが約1470年にイギリスチェシュアイアレイトン ウィス ミンシュルで生まれた時，父Thomas Brookeは24歳，母Anne Venablesは18歳であった。1487年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアでRoger Mainwaringと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1499年にイギリスチェシュアイアナントウィチで30歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Brooke(이)가 대략 1470년 영국 체실르 레이턴 위스 민슈에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Brooke(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne Venables(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1487년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 Roger Mainwaring(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1499년 영국 체실르 난트위치에서 30세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Brooke nasceu aproximadamente 1470, em Leighton with Minshull, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Brooke, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Anne Venables, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Roger Mainwaring em 1487, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1499, em Nantwich, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 30 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Brooke родилась около 1470 г. в местности лиитон вит миншулл, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Brooke было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Anne Venables, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger Mainwaring в 1487 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1499 г. в местности нантвич, чешир, Англия в возрасте 30 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Brooke nació aproximadamente 1470, en Leighton with Minshull, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Brooke, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Anne Venables, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Roger Mainwaring en 1487, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió en 1499, en Nantwich, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 30 años.
